title: In another wild turn for AI chips, Meta signs deal for millions of Amazon AI CPUs
snippet: Meta has commandeered a big chunk of Amazon's homegrown CPUs (not GPUs) for AI agentic workloads, signaling that a new kind of chip race has begun.
